---
title: "Starting a new website!"
description: "Notes on setting up a new website using Quarto and GitHub Pages."
author: "Yoyomanzoor"
date: "2026-02-20"
categories:
  - code
---

They say don't reinvent the wheel. But sometimes, you just want to build your own car.

I've been experimenting with website generation over many iterations. My [first website](https://yoyomanzoor.github.io/Kit-Testing/) was a [jekyll](https://jekyllrb.com/) site, where I wrote all the HTML for index pages that linked to jupyter notebooks. Later, I tried [Bookdown](https://bookdown.org/) for a [website summarizing my methods for metabolic cage analysis](https://yoyomanzoor.github.io/Metabolic-Cages/).

<!-- {{< github Yoyomanzoor/Yoyomanzoor >}} -->
